eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mohave, AZ; at 06:51 PM ON APR 24, 2026 Effective until 02:51 AM APR 25, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mohave County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Bullhead City Police Department is looking for 64 year old Ma Melba Cabbab. She is an Asian female4 feet 9 inches tall, 112 pounds wearing a blue sun hat with hearts, red shirt, purple cardigan and black multicolored stretch pants. last seen on foot near Community Park 1251 Highway 95 If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
